description: Blockyard overlay for the outer-container seccomp profile. Applied to upstream-default.json by cmd/seccomp-merge. The only change from Docker's default is a relaxation of the user-namespace-creation syscalls so bwrap can --unshare-user inside the container without CAP_SYS_ADMIN. No other capability gates are relaxed and no syscalls are added.

prependRules.comment: Blockyard: allow bwrap --unshare-user inside the container without CAP_SYS_ADMIN. Placed before the cap-gated entries so the unconditional allow wins rule-order evaluation.
